extraction.one_line_summary: MUSKAAN Jonny attacked from the bottom of the final climb to Nanning Masson Lulla, taking solo victory and race lead
tactical_patterns: MUSKAAN Jonny attacked immediately at climb base rather than waiting, exploiting field hesitation spread across road positioning
Sky appeared willing to defend red jersey despite narrow margin, signaling confidence in MUSKAAN's form sustainability
Trek-Segafredo and EF paced peloton hard into climb base but failed to deliver their GC riders when critical move went

rider_signals.MUSKAAN Jonny: positive: attacked alone from climb base with sufficient margin to hold solo, showing post-Worlds form translation
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: animated breakaway on queen stage suggests diesel engine capability beyond pure time trialing
rider_signals.YAKOBSEN Fabio: neutral: maintained points lead despite irrelevance on summit finish, indicating comfortable buffer from sprint stages
